creator: dan@langille.org
text:
See 
http://www.mail-archive.com/bacula-devel@lists.sourceforge.net/msg05087.html

I have sent this patch upstream.

I thank the OP for the patch, but patches to vendor code are best sent 
to the vendor.  :)

If you wish to pursue this further, I suggest the bacula-devel mailing 
list is your best bet.

cheers
